title: CampMinder integration with Monday.com
excerpt:

posts.author: pragnamehta (Pragna Mehta)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,
Does anyone know if an integration exists with Campminder (web-based camp management software)? My research says no but was wondering if anyone else can confirm? We are trying to solve the following challenge - when an online registration is completed in Campminder, is there a way to send the some of the information to a Monday.com board?
Thanks!

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I can help you with that. let me know if you would like to discuss the possibilities. It would be done using API call. Looking forward to hear back from you.

posts.author: pragnamehta (Pragna Mehta)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s great! Would like to learn about the possibilities. Can you elaborate please?

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be happy tu jump on call to discuss that. Let me know if I can DM you.
